headline: Intuit’s FedNow Move Links Real Time Payments With Undervalued Shares
summary: Intuit, ticker NasdaqGS:INTU, has completed the Federal Reserve’s FedNow Service certification. The company is launching real time payments for US businesses through its financial software platform. The rollout supports instant payroll, payables, and bill pay capabilities for Intuit customers. For a company built around tax, accounting, and personal finance software, Intuit’s move into FedNow enabled payments ties its tools more tightly into day to day money movement. Real time settlement...
